scores.correctness_notes: Fully correct. Covers all key fields (type, description, filename), the containers/resources name-matching rule, and adds accurate extra detail about deploying and publishing. Only omission is upstream-source, which the gold standard notes as commonly used but unofficial — not a correctness error.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — deploy --resource flag, charmcraft upload-resource with --image digest flag are all real features
